product_visual_description: Auricolare Bluetooth in-ear singolo con gancio auricolare ergonomico. Corpo compatto e lucido di colore nero con finitura opaca/semi-lucida. Il gancio è un archetto sottile e flessibile che si aggancia al padiglione auricolare. Sul lato esterno è presente un piccolo LED luminoso verde/turchese che indica lo stato di connessione. Il driver è da 10mm. Dimensioni molto ridotte (circa 5g), profilo basso e discreto. Design minimalista, privo di elementi sporgenti ad eccezione dell'archetto. La reference principale mostra l'auricolare indossato sull'orecchio destro di un atleta maschio con illuminazione viola/neon.
global_rule:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photo of the Auricolare Bluetooth GiDaCom YX08 — a compact single in-ear earphone with ergonomic hook, glossy black body, small teal LED indicator, and 10mm driver.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.

THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.

IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE FOR THIS JOB: LOGO_PROVIDED
- For images 02, 04, 06, 09: integrate the brand logo (SECOND image_input) per LOGO INTEGRATION RULES.
- For images 01a, 01b, 03, 05, 07, 08: behave as NO_LOGO — DO NOT ADD ANY LOGO, BRAND NAME, WATERMARK, OR PLACEHOLDER TEXT. Fill every corner with content.
NEVER write the text 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER', or similar AS TEXT in the image.

ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif (e.g. Montserrat Bold, Inter Black).
Accent color: #00E5FF. Background palette: #080C1A, #0D1B2A, #1A2744.

images.name: Hero Sfondo Bianco
images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photo of the Auricolare Bluetooth GiDaCom YX08 — a compact single in-ear earphone with ergonomic hook, glossy black body, small teal LED indicator, and 10mm driver.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions. Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it. Do NOT blend it with the background. If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE: NO_LOGO for this image. DO NOT ADD ANY LOGO, BRAND NAME, WATERMARK, OR PLACEHOLDER. Fill every corner with content.
NEVER write the text 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER' in the image.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG. Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 01A — HERO SFONDO BIANCO:

STEP 1 — EXTRACT THE PRODUCT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO:
Cut out the auricolare Bluetooth GiDaCom YX08 with precision: the compact black in-ear earphone with its ergonomic hook/archetto, glossy body, and small teal LED. Extract it as a clean photographic cutout with zero background residue. Show the full earphone including the hook, at a slight 3/4 angle to reveal depth and dimensionality. Scale it to occupy approximately 60-70% of the canvas height, centered slightly above the canvas center.

STEP 2 — BACKGROUND:
Pure white background RGB(255,255,255). Absolutely no gradients, no shadows, no vignettes, no textures, no tints. The only acceptable element besides the product cutout is a very subtle soft drop shadow directly beneath the product on the white surface — shadow color: rgba(0,0,0,0.08), blur radius 40px, offset 0px 20px. This shadow must not touch or alter the product itself.

No text. No logos. No watermarks. No icons. No borders. No patterns. No empty reserved space. Pure product on pure white.

NEGATIVE: No redrawn product. No illustrated style. No background effects touching the product. No text in any language. No colored backgrounds. No grey backgrounds.

NEVER write the text 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER' in the image.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG. Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 01B — HERO CON EFFETTO SONIC BURST:

STEP 1 — RENDER THE PRODUCT EXACTLY AS IN THE REFERENCE PHOTO:
Place the photographic cutout of the GiDaCom YX08 auricolare Bluetooth at the center of the canvas, slightly right of center, occupying about 55-65% of canvas height. The earphone is black and glossy with ergonomic hook and small teal/cyan LED on the outer face. Slight 3/4 angle. The product layer is SEPARATE and sits on TOP of everything. THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE. Separate layer always. If any background effect bleeds onto the product — FAILURE.

STEP 2 — ADD BACKGROUND EFFECT ONLY BEHIND THE PRODUCT:
Background base: deep navy-black gradient radial from #0D1B2A center to #020509 edges.
ONLY in the area BEHIND and AROUND the product — NOT touching, NOT overlapping the product:
— Explosive sonic burst emanating from behind the earphone: multiple concentric sound wave arcs in cyan #00E5FF and electric blue #0080FF, starting from the center-left and radiating outward in all directions. Arcs have varying thickness (1-4px) and decreasing opacity from center (80%) to edge (5%).
— Bluetooth signal rings: 3 curved arcs in #00E5FF at 60% opacity, suggesting wireless connectivity, positioned to the upper-left of the product.
— Prismatic light streaks: thin diagonal lines of prismatic color (cyan, violet #7B00FF, white) radiating from the product zone, max 30% opacity.
— Floating audio particles: small hexagonal and circular particles in #00E5FF and #FFFFFF, scattered across the background, 10-25% opacity.
— The overall mood: futuristic, high-energy, premium audio technology.
— Corner decoration: very faint geometric circuit-board pattern at 6% opacity in #00E5FF filling all four corners.

No text. No logos. No watermarks. No empty space reserved for a logo. Every pixel of the background filled with atmospheric effect or gradient.

NEGATIVE: No effects touching the product. No redrawn product. No text. No logo placeholder.

images.prompt:

ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG. Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 02 — BENEFIT PRINCIPALE:

Background: Deep dark navy gradient #080C1A to #1A2744, left to right. Subtle diagonal geometric line pattern overlay at 4% opacity in #00E5FF. Top-left corner: very faint Bluetooth wave icon at 8% opacity as decorative element.

LEFT 55% of canvas: Large photographic cutout of the GiDaCom YX08 earphone, positioned center-left, vertically centered, occupying about 70% of the left zone height. A soft radial glow ONLY on the background behind the product (NOT on the product itself) in #00E5FF at 15% opacity creates separation from the dark bg. Below the product: in accent color #00E5FF, small text 'Bluetooth 5.0 · 10mm Bass · 20H'.

RIGHT 45% of canvas: Vertical list of 5 benefits. Each benefit line has:
— A checkmark icon '✓' in #00E5FF (bold, 28px equivalent)
— Bold white text on dark background, max 5-6 words per line
— A thin horizontal separator line in #00E5FF at 20% opacity between each item

BENEFIT LIST (in Italian, bold white, 5-6 words max each):
✓ Audio Hi-Fi con bassi potenti
✓ 20 ore di autonomia totale
✓ Resistente a sudore e pioggia
✓ Ultra leggero, solo 5 grammi
✓ Connessione stabile fino a 10m

TOP of right column: heading text in #00E5FF, bold, all-caps: 'PERCHÉ SCEGLIERLO'

BOTTOM of right column: thin accent border line #00E5FF.

Fill the entire canvas with content — no empty corner reserved for anything except the logo placement specified below.

LOGO PLACEMENT: Integrate the brand logo (provided as the SECOND reference image) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner of the final image. Logo width: approximately 12-15% of the image width. Padding: about 4% from the right edge and 4% from the bottom edge. The logo must be clearly visible and legible. If the background behind the logo has a similar tone to the logo colors, add a subtle contrast enhancement (soft drop shadow OR a very faint white backdrop card at 10-20% opacity) to ensure readability. The logo is a brand marker: do NOT distort it, do NOT tilt it, do NOT let other elements cover it. Preserve the EXACT colors and proportions of the original logo. Do NOT add any text label next to the logo. This logo is the CLIENT brand identity (distinct from 'No supplier brand names or logos' in the negative prompt, which refers only to manufacturer marks visible on the product).

NEGATIVE: No redrawn product. No effects on the product. No English text. No placeholder text.

IMAGE 03 — SPECIFICHE AUDIO E CONNETTIVITÀ:

Background: Rich dark charcoal gradient #111111 to #1C1C2E (top-left dark to bottom-right slightly purple-dark). Subtle hexagonal grid pattern at 5% opacity in #00E5FF covers the entire background. Top-right corner and bottom-left corner have faint radial glow in #00E5FF at 8% opacity.

TOP CENTER: Section title in #00E5FF, bold all-caps, large: 'SPECIFICHE AUDIO E CONNETTIVITÀ'
Thin horizontal accent line #00E5FF beneath the title.

CENTER LAYOUT: 2-column grid of specification cards, with the product cutout floated in the center-right area.

LEFT COLUMN — 3 spec cards stacked vertically, each card: dark bg #0D0D1F, accent border-left 3px #00E5FF, padding 20px:
  Card 1: Icon (headphones) — Label 'DRIVER' bold white — Value '10mm Bass Driver' accent cyan
  Card 2: Icon (sound wave) — Label 'RISPOSTA IN FREQUENZA' bold white — Value '20Hz – 20.000Hz' accent cyan
  Card 3: Icon (wifi) — Label 'BLUETOOTH' bold white — Value 'Versione 5.0 HD' accent cyan

RIGHT COLUMN — 3 spec cards stacked vertically, same style:
  Card 4: Icon (phone) — Label 'PORTATA' bold white — Value 'Fino a 10 metri' accent cyan
  Card 5: Icon (microphone) — Label 'CHIAMATE' bold white — Value 'Vivavoce integrato' accent cyan
  Card 6: Icon (devices) — Label 'COMPATIBILITÀ' bold white — Value 'Universale Bluetooth' accent cyan

Far RIGHT: Product cutout of GiDaCom YX08, tall and prominent, spanning approximately 35% of canvas width, centered vertically, with hairline accent lines connecting from the product to the spec cards on both sides (callout style, but minimal).

BOTTOM CENTER: Bold white text on dark pill: 'AUDIO HI-FI · CONNESSIONE STABILE · DOPPIO CHIP'

Fill the entire canvas with content.

NEGATIVE: No redrawn product. No effects on product. No English text labels. No empty corners.

IMAGE 07 — LIFESTYLE:

Show a fit man, approximately 28-35 years old, athletic build, wearing dark gym/sport clothes, jogging or running on an urban street at early evening / golden-blue hour. He is mid-stride, in natural motion, looking forward with a confident relaxed expression. He is wearing the GiDaCom YX08 earphone in his right ear — use the photographic cutout from the reference placed realistically and precisely on the ear, matching the natural perspective and ear angle. The earphone's small teal LED glints subtly in the ambient light.

Environment: Modern European city street, slightly blurred background (bokeh depth of field), warm streetlights mixing with cool blue sky. Wet pavement reflecting city lights. Mood: authentic, energetic, aspirational — not staged or stock-photo stiff.

Lighting: Natural mixed golden-blue lighting, slight backlighting creating an atmospheric rim light on the athlete's shoulder. Shadows are soft.

The product placement must feel completely natural — as if the person was actually wearing this earphone during a real run.

Fill the full 2000x2000px frame with the lifestyle scene. NO text overlays. NO graphic elements. NO logo space. NO icons. Pure lifestyle photography feel. The earphone must be clearly visible on the ear, in focus enough to be recognizable.

NEGATIVE: No redrawn product. No effects touching product. No text in any language. No logo placeholder. No generic stock-photo feel. No stiff poses.

IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE: NO_LOGO for this image. DO NOT ADD ANY LOGO, BRAND NAME, WATERMARK, OR PLACEHOLDER. Fill every corner with content.
NEVER write the text 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER' in the image.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG. Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 08 — DOVE USARLO:

Background: Dark slate gradient #0E1117 to #1A2133. Thin accent grid at 4% opacity #00E5FF.

TOP CENTER: Bold all-caps white title: 'USALO OVUNQUE, SEMPRE'
Subtitle in #00E5FF smaller: 'Versatile · Compatto · Affidabile'
Thin #00E5FF separator line.

MAIN AREA: 2×2 grid of 4 scenario cards. Each card: dark bg #0D1520, border 1px #00E5FF at 60% opacity, rounded corners 12px, padding 30px. Cards have equal size and spacing.

Card 1 (TOP LEFT) — 🏃 icon:
Title bold white: 'SPORT E ALLENAMENTO'
Subtext small gray: 'Stabile durante la corsa'
Small detail: IPX4 badge in #00E5FF

Subtext small gray: 'Chiamate chiare, mani libere'
Small detail: Mic icon in #00E5FF

Card 3 (BOTTOM LEFT) — ✈️ icon:

Subtext small gray: 'Compatto, nessun ingombro'
Small detail: Bluetooth icon in #00E5FF

Card 4 (BOTTOM RIGHT) — 🎵 icon:

Subtext small gray: 'Bass 10mm, suono Hi-Fi'

images.name: Garanzia e Trust
images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photo of the Auricolare Bluetooth GiDaCom YX08 — a compact single in-ear earphone with ergonomic hook, glossy black body, small teal LED indicator, and 10mm driver.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions. Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it. Do NOT blend it with the background. If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE: LOGO_PROVIDED for this image. See LOGO PLACEMENT instructions at the end of this prompt.
NEVER write the text 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER' in the image.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG. Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 09 — GARANZIA E TRUST:

Background: Very dark premium #080C1A with faint repeating shield/checkmark pattern at 4% opacity in #00E5FF — communicates security and trust. A very subtle radial gradient from #0D1B2A at center to #040609 at edges.
Thin outer border frame: 2px solid #00E5FF at 60% opacity, 20px inset from canvas edges.

TOP CENTER:
Large bold all-caps white heading: 'ACQUISTO PROTETTO'
Subheading in #00E5FF: 'Il tuo ordine è al sicuro con noi'
Thin separator line #00E5FF.

MAIN AREA — 2×2 grid of 4 trust badge cards. Each card: bg #0D1520, border 1px #00E5FF, rounded corners 16px. Cards spaced evenly across center of canvas.

Card 1 (TOP LEFT):
Large icon: shield with checkmark (in #00E5FF)
Title bold white: 'GARANZIA 12 MESI'
Subtext gray small: 'Assistenza post-vendita inclusa'

Card 2 (TOP RIGHT):
Large icon: lightning bolt / fast delivery (in #00E5FF)
Title bold white: 'SPEDIZIONE RAPIDA'
Subtext gray small: 'Consegna veloce e tracciata'

Card 3 (BOTTOM LEFT):
Large icon: certified star badge (in #00E5FF)
Title bold white: 'QUALITÀ CERTIFICATA'
Subtext gray small: 'Standard audio Hi-Fi verificati'

Card 4 (BOTTOM RIGHT):
Large icon: headset / support agent (in #00E5FF)
Title bold white: 'SUPPORTO DEDICATO'
Subtext gray small: 'Assistenza clienti disponibile'

BOTTOM STRIP: Dark band #060810 spanning full width:
LEFT: Product cutout of GiDaCom YX08, small (about 15% canvas height), slightly angled
CENTER: Bold white text 'SODDISFATTI O RIMBORSATI'
RIGHT: (space used by logo placement below)

Full frame of content — no reserved empty area anywhere except where the logo is placed.

LOGO PLACEMENT: Integrate the brand logo (provided as the SECOND reference image) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner of the final image. Logo width: approximately 12-15% of the image width. Padding: about 4% from the right edge and 4% from the bottom edge. The logo must be clearly visible and legible. If the background behind the logo has a similar tone to the logo colors, add a subtle contrast enhancement (soft drop shadow OR a very faint white backdrop card at 10-20% opacity) to ensure readability. The logo is a brand marker: do NOT distort it, do NOT tilt it, do NOT let other elements cover it. Preserve the EXACT colors and proportions of the original logo. Do NOT add any text label next to the logo. This logo is the CLIENT brand identity (distinct from 'No supplier brand names or logos' in the negative prompt, which refers only to manufacturer marks visible on the product).

NEGATIVE: No redrawn product. No effects touching product. No English text. No empty placeholder areas. No placeholder badge text.

negative_prompt: No redrawn product. No illustrated or cartoon style product. No product recreated from scratch. No glow or color effect applied directly ON the product. No shape or proportion alteration of the product. No background effects touching, overlapping, or bleeding onto the product. No text in English (except unavoidable technical abbreviations like 'Hi-Fi', 'Bluetooth', 'IPX4'). No supplier brand names or logos from the reference photo. No placeholder text like 'LOGO HERE', '[BRAND]', 'LOGO CLIENTE', 'YOUR LOGO', 'BRAND HERE'. No empty rectangular or circular space intentionally left blank for a logo. No watermarks, no signatures, no trademark symbols. Do not write the word 'LOGO' anywhere in the image. No generic stock-photo staging. No stiff unnatural poses in lifestyle image. No visible ASIN or model numbers as decorative text.
